title: Amphiglossa tecta
taxonomy: Amphiglossa tecta is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to the Western Cape province of South Africa. The exact classification of Amphiglossa tecta is as follows: it belongs to the genus Amphiglossa, the family Asteraceae, the order Asterales, the class Magnoliopsida, and the kingdom Plantae. This classification suggests that Amphiglossa tecta is a type of daisy or related plant, given the family Asteraceae. More research may be needed to confirm the exact classification of Amphiglossa tecta.
